title: Plutarch, Moralia: Advice About Keeping Well
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Advice About Keeping Well.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Advice About Keeping Well.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Advice About Keeping Well': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
